_comment_managers: Only manage GitHub Actions. This fork's Python/Docker deps never affect the published image (it is built from upstream jitsi/skynet directly), so leaving them to Renovate would just create noise and upstream-merge conflicts.

packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps (build.yml is SHA-pinned; Renovate keeps both the SHA and the # vN comment current).
Major bumps are surfaced on the Dependency Dashboard for manual approval rather than auto-merged.
